candidates.why: Best direct total for short-term/current debt and current portion of long-term debt. Excludes lease row separately shown, so fits baseline STD best.
Represents current portion of long-term debt, but appears to be a component/subset of Current debt in some years; using both risks double counting.
Not a balance-sheet liability stock; not suitable for STD.
Wrong maturity bucket for STD.
Cash flow financing inflow, not balance-sheet STD.
Cash flow financing outflow, not balance-sheet STD.

variables.notes: Chose 'Current debt' as the clean current debt total. Excluded lease-related rows per baseline rule and avoided 'LT Debt Maturing within 1 Year' to prevent double counting with the broader current debt total.
